titles.en: Punishment of not offering Isha Prayer till midnight

text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبَانٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَیْدٍ عَنْ مُوسَی بْنِ بَکْرٍ عَنْ زُرَارَهَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَلَکٌ مُوَکَّلٌ یَقُولُ مَنْ نَامَ عَنِ الْعِشَاءِ إِلَی نِصْفِ اللَّیْلِ فَلَا أَنَامَ اللَّهُ عَیْنَهُ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. al-Hassan b. Aban from al-Hussain b. Sa’eed from al-Nadhr b. Suwayd from Musa b. Bakr from Zurarah from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “The appointed angel calls out: May Allah not give sleep to the eyes of those who go to bed without offering Isha Prayer by midnight.”
